title: Consumer contract: built-environment change dashboard (domain property_buildings, v1)
description: Dashboard payload for open-data built-environment intelligence (footprints, EO change signals, wards, public land use). Phase 1 does not require property registry, building permit, or tax-system fields in coverage_summary—municipal-shaped keys may appear only when later-stage authorized integrations supply them. Primary question: where built form may have changed and what needs field review. Decision support only—no tax, permit-guilt, owner, or enforcement claims. The key mismatch_summary is a legacy aggregate slot for change/triage counts; prefer built_up_change_candidates, high_change_wards, and review_candidates for new work.

mismatch_summary.description: Aggregate triage/readiness counts (legacy name). Must not encode tax or permit-enforcement conclusions.

built_up_change_candidates.description: Spatial or unit-level candidates where built-up or footprint signals suggest recent change.

new_construction_candidate_areas.description: Polygons or references to areas warranting on-site review for possible new construction (not a permit verdict).

footprint_growth_summary.description: Rollups of footprint growth or delta proxies by ward or city, with explicit uncertainty.

high_change_wards.description: Wards or spatial units ranked for review from stacked open signals.

issue_type.description: e.g. built_up_change_candidate, new_construction_area_candidate, high_change_ward, eo_change_signal_review, data_readiness_review — not tax or permit-mismatch verdicts
